prompt: Ultra-realistic conceptual portrait of a young man walking forward while enormous black human shadows behind him pull his hoodie, arms, and legs in different directions like emotional chains. Each shadow represents pressure, fear, expectations, comparison, and self-doubt. Despite being dragged back, he keeps moving forward with a calm but exhausted expression. He wears ultra-premium layered streetwear in muted charcoal, beige, and washed gray tones. Strong directional spotlight from above creates dramatic long shadows stretching across the floor. The atmosphere feels emotionally heavy, cinematic, and fashion-editorial inspired. Typography: tiny handwritten text: “they pull me in every direction” giant brutalist typography: “PRESSURE” “STABLE” crossed out aggressively with rough red paint strokes.
